ItacPersonItem.Notes: For a short biographical account see Antonino Mongitore, , Bibliotheca Sicula, Didaci Bua, Palermo, Vol.I, pp. 205-206 (British Library Shelfmark:610.m.10.) Nickname not recorded by Maylender
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
